## Meeting Purpose

[Coordinate content creation, import, and presentation for an upcoming client meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team is preparing to showcase progress with \~40 articles (10 published, 30 ready)](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Kirkland successfully imported content into Airtable, mapping fields for CMS integration](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Marcel focusing on presentation layer, tagging, and enrichment fields in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Jurgen to create images for articles, Matt to publish and prepare content](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Kirkland working on resolving technical issues for live publishing before end of day](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

## Topics

### Content Import and Airtable Setup

  - [Kirkland imported content into Airtable, mapping fields to CMS](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Created formula fields for name/title, cleaned up unnecessary columns](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [System prompt included but may not be needed in final Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Marcel plans to add enrichment fields, tags, and flags for content status](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

### Content Creation and Publishing Goals

  - [Aim: \~40 articles (10 published, 30 ready) to show progress](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Matt to publish 10 articles and prepare more using workflows](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Jurgen creating images for articles (est. 10 minutes per batch)](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Team focusing on quantity to demonstrate readiness to "crank out" content](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### Technical Challenges and CMS Integration

  - [Kirkland identifying bugs in structure (static vs. dynamic field pulling)](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [Working to resolve issues for potential live publishing of 200 articles](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Will continue troubleshooting, aiming to resolve by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)

### Presentation Strategy for Client Meeting

  - [Focus on showcasing progress and readiness to scale](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Highlight quantity of prepared content and publishing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Address any technical hurdles encountered during setup](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel: Spend 10 minutes tagging and enriching content in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Jurgen: Create and send images to Matt for articles](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Matt: Publish 10 articles, prepare additional content using workflows](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Kirkland: Investigate and resolve CMS integration issues](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Team: Prepare to discuss progress and any technical challenges in client meeting](https://fathom.video/share/CLeEAFEqMbLvMjZJB4hRK3sxXEPzXzZx?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
